introSection: Pomme is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Fééryland in Tournehem-sur-la-Hem, Hauts-de-France, France.
fullText: Pomme is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Fééryland in Tournehem-sur-la-Hem, Hauts-de-France, France.
